text: A man in an enclosed area holding a baseball bat.
A head of broccoli grows in a garden.
A woman in a hay and coat outside in the snow.
A skateboarder listens to music as he rides beside a beach.
A young boy in pajamas holding up a camera.
Inside an enclosed area, beyond which stands trees, lies a rocky domicile and an earthen area for one lone zebra to stand on.
Two giraffes behind a rock barricade, neck to neck.
Three giraffes of three heights standing near each other all looking at camera, in tall grass with shrubs and trees behind.
Three children playing a Wii game in a red room
A BLT sandwich on a long piece of bread.
